scope.intended_variant: Smucker's Uncrustables Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread Sandwich

verdict.summary: Composition and exact flavor identity pass visual review, but character-exact package text is not independently proven and owner approval is absent. The candidate remains fail-closed.

checks.evidence: All six visible cartons use the brown Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread design; no other flavor or invented product is visible.
A blue 4-count badge is visible on each of the six cartons, although the smallest badge text is below character-proof resolution.

White foam cooler, lid, green Salutem emblem, SALUTEM SOLUTIONS wordmark, and OUR BEST SOLUTIONS FOR YOU line visually match the approved kit anchor. Apple Vision recognized both primary cooler lines at confidence 1.0.
Only the intended hazelnut cartons, the approved cooler, and four approved gel packs are visible.
Cartons are supported inside the cooler and the two external gel packs contact the ground plane; no obvious floating item is visible.
The cooler, lid, cartons, and external gel packs remain inside the canvas with white margin. Natural overlap inside the cooler is not an edge crop.

The main flavor name is visually correct, but small claims, top-panel copy, weight lines, and some 4-count badge copy cannot be proven character-exact at this render size. Local Apple Vision returned high-confidence deviations including 'FOR FROZEN SHIPNENTS', 'NO High Fructabe', 'Coro Syrop', 'NOFgh Fractone', and 'Cern Syrop'. OCR also misread known-good reference text at comparable scale, so these strings are not treated as a definitive counterfeit finding; they do prevent a fail-closed PASS.
No owner approval is recorded for this exact candidate SHA-256.

ocr.interpretation: OCR succeeded and is retained as auxiliary evidence. Because it also produced false readings on the exact references, OCR cannot by itself establish either PASS or counterfeit text. Under fail-closed rules, unresolved character integrity remains REVIEW_REQUIRED.

required_next_action.details: Do not publish this file. Either obtain explicit owner approval for this exact SHA-256 after full-resolution review, or replace generated package faces with source-faithful exact-product artwork and rerun QA.
